description_long: This object is a double grave plot set on a rectangular tiled base, featuring two upright black headstones with curved tops and a central wooden cross. The headstones are inscribed with Cyrillic text and one includes a portrait, suggesting a personalized memorial. In front of each headstone are rectangular grave borders, likely marking the burial sites. The cross is made of dark wood and stands between the two headstones, adding a traditional religious element. A third, smaller rectangular plaque or marker is positioned at the rear left of the plot, possibly for additional inscriptions or dedications. The overall design is somber and formal, with a combination of polished stone and wood materials.
description: A double grave plot with two black headstones, a central wooden cross, and a tiled base, featuring Cyrillic inscriptions and a portrait. The design is formal, with grave borders and an additional plaque.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the headstones, the wooden cross, and the rectangular grave borders on the tiled base.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying both headstones with inscriptions and a portrait, the central wooden cross, and the additional plaque at the rear left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the depth of the headstones and grave borders, with the cross visible between the stones.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the headstones, the cross, and the additional plaque, with the tiled base clearly visible.
